element.hint: Display the numeric value inside each cell
element.label: Show Values in Cells
element.name: show_values

element.hint: Custom label text displayed below the X-axis
element.label: X-Axis Label
element.name: x_axis_label

element.hint: Color representing the minimum value in the scale
element.label: Color Scale Min
element.name: color_scale_min

element.hint: Corner radius for each heatmap cell in pixels
element.label: Cell Corner Radius
element.name: cell_radius

element.hint: Color representing the maximum value in the scale
element.label: Color Scale Max
element.name: color_scale_max

element.hint: Custom label text displayed beside the Y-axis
element.label: Y-Axis Label
element.name: y_axis_label

element.hint: Font size in pixels for values displayed in cells
element.label: Value Font Size
element.name: value_font_size

element.hint: Width of the border around each cell in pixels
element.label: Cell Border Width
element.name: cell_border_width
